title: [Bug]: ERRO[0001] failed to move the rootless netns slirp4netns process to the systemd user.slice: Process org.freedesktop.systemd1 exited with status 1
body:
### Issue Description

I get this error when starting containers, when I try to use a created network, but not sure what it means. This is a new install, using REDHAT 7.9 and static built binaries of 4.2.1 from https://github.com/mgoltzsche/podman-static 




### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. docker run -it --rm --net delivery-scripts_default alpine /bin/sh




### Describe the results you received

ERRO[0001] failed to move the rootless netns slirp4netns process to the systemd user.slice: Process org.freedesktop.systemd1 exited with status 1

### Describe the results you expected

running container with custom network.

### Privileged Or Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body:
We do not support RHEL 7 with such new podman versions. The RHEL 7 is just to old. I suggest you update to RHEL8/9 and use podman from the main repos there because this is well tested.

If you want to use it like that you could just ignore the error, I suspect the systemd version is to old so it triggers an error.
